case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. APRIL PERRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $573.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, APRIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, APRIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 45.95 - SERVED SEP-15-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, APRIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOANNE--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, APRIL $573.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $618.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
